title: Garlicky Norwegian Pudding Skewers
description: A unique and flavorful appetizer featuring Norwegian black pudding on skewers, infused with an intense, garlicky flavor.

ingredients.name: Norwegian black pudding
ingredients.notes: Available in most Scandinavian markets or online

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince or finely chop for best flavor

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: Soak skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Thread a black pudding cube, garlic, and parsley onto each skewer.
Grill or broil skewers until heated through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
Optional: Let cool slightly before serving.
